title: Trump's Taylor Swift AI drama amuses Gen Z Democrats at Chicago's DNC
shortDescription: “I feel like if Taylor were to endorse Harris, that would have a huge effect on the youth," said 24-year-old Democrat Elisa Calderon.

title: Trump claims Taylor Swift endorsed him through reposted AI image
shortDescription: Did Taylor Swift really endorse Trump for president? Donald Trump reposted a post artificial intelligence in his re-election bid for the White House.

title: Donald Trump (mostly) sticks to the script on Harris; will that last?

title: FBI concludes Iran behind hacking attempt in Trump campaign

title: Mark Hamill opposes Donald Trump in new video
